title: Rendezvous on Barkhesh
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Mission |prev=[[Ambush at Mos Eisley]][[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] |conc= |next=[[Search for the Nonnah|Search for the ''Nonnah'']] |image=[[File:RendezvousOnBarkhesh-RogueSquadron.jpg]] |name=Rendezvous on Barkhesh |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |objective=Escort supply convoy to safety |date=[[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]The Rendezvous on Barkhesh occurred shortly after the [[Evacuation of Yavin]] as established in [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the evacuation to [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]], as well as dating the [[Battle of Corellia (1 ABY)|defection]] of [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to taking place before [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. ''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'' portrays the Rendezvous on Barkhesh as taking place before the Defection at Corellia. Therefore, the mission to Barkhesh must take place in 0.5 ABY. |place=[[Barkhesh/Legends|Barkhesh]], [[Seitia sector/Legends|Seitia sector]], [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Barkhesh system/Legends|Barkhesh system]] |result=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] victory **Supply convoy is successfully escorted to safety |side1=*Alliance to Restore the Republic *[[Barkhesh Resistance]] |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] *[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] **5 [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] *1 [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] *[[Rebel Base|Supply base]] *Supply convoy **5 [[Armed transport]]s **3 [[Combat vehicle]]s *Barkhesh Resistance soldiers |ppl2=*8 [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]] *8 [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]] *6 [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] *4 [[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolasers]] *1 Turbolaser {{C|Mounted on large turret}} *6 [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=None |casual2=All forces |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Rogue Squadron, this is General Rieekan. One of our shuttles will rendezvous with a small convoy from local resistance on Barkhesh, which must first travel through imperial territory. They carry equipment and supplies vital to the Rebellion. Your mission is to rendezvous with that convoy and escort it to the landing zone. Good luck.|General Carlist Rieekan's briefing|}} The '''Rendezvous on Barkhesh''' was a battle fought on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Barkhesh/Legends|Barkhesh]] between [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] forces under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]]—allied with native [[Barkhesh Resistance]] forces—and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. Following the [[Evacuation of Yavin|evacuation]] of [[Great Temple/Legends|Yavin Base]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Alliance needed to recoup the large number of supplies either left behind on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] or destroyed by Imperial forces during the evacuation. The Barkhesh Resistance offered supplies to the Alliance, and an Alliance [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] was assigned to rendezvous with a Barkhesh supply [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] and pick them up. Because of Imperial forces in the region, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] were assigned to escort duty. The Rogues protected the vital convoy as it moved from a [[Rebel Base|supply base]] to the landing zone, engaging [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]], [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]], and static [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] defenses. Rogue Squadron eliminated the enemy presence, and the cargo transfer proceeded unhindered. ==Prelude== {{Quote|All right, Rogue Group, the supply vehicles have begun moving. Their escort will follow shortly.|General Carlist Rieekan|}} [[File:BarkheshConvoy_2.jpg|thumb|left|300px|The convoy of Barkhesh Resistance transports prepares to move out.]] In [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]], following the [[Evacuation of Yavin|evacuation]] of [[Great Temple/Legends|Yavin Base]] in the wake of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] found itself short on critical supplies. To this end, the [[Barkhesh Resistance]], based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Barkhesh/Legends|Barkhesh]] in the [[Seitia sector/Legends|Seitia sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], offered to transfer several [[Transport/Legends|transports]] worth of supplies to the Alliance, which they did on a semi-[[Standard year/Legends|yearly]] basis.''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]'' [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] oversaw the operation, which would require the transports to traverse a series of canyons between their [[Rebel Base|supply base]] and the predetermined landing zone. Aware that local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces would attempt to stop the operation, Rieekan assigned [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to fly escort for the [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]]. ==The battle== {{Quote|Luke, we've already got trouble. Probe droids.''"
"''Pick your targets and go.|Wedge Antilles and Luke Skywalker|}} {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)}} [[File:Rebel_convoy_barkesh.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Rogue Squadron engages Imperial forces.]] Commander Skywalker, leading a five-[[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] formation of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]], arrived at the designated coordinates on Barkhesh to hook up with the Resistance's convoy and immediately encountered [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]] near the supply base. Rogue Squadron made short work of a group of four of them, then engaged a second group of four shortly after flying over the supply base and rendezvousing with the convoy proper. With the immediate area clear of threats, the supply convoy—consisting of five large [[armed transport]]s and three small [[combat vehicle]]s—began to move out toward the landing zone. [[File:BarkheshRendezvous_2.jpg|thumb|left|300px|An Alliance shuttle meets with a Barkhesh Resistance transport.]] The local Imperial forces had placed six [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]] in the canyons between the supply base and the landing zone, in addition to static [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] defenses mounted on both the ridges and on the canyon floor. Five [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] were also deployed to destroy the convoy, while a sixth was sent to attack the supply base. Rogue Squadron was [[Starfighter combat/Legends|forced]] to deal with each threat to ensure the safety of the convoy, employing both [[Laser/Legends|lasers]] and [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]]. Successfully [[Death/Legends|eliminating]] the immediate threat, Skywalker and the Rogues also engaged a small Imperial base not far from the landing zone. Although defended by two AT-STs, a turbolaser mounted on a tall turret, and six [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], the base was destroyed. {{Endgame}} ==Aftermath== {{Quote|The shuttle is clear. She'll pick up the rest of this cargo. The Rebel Alliance will appreciate those supplies, especially after we lost Yavin Base.|General Carlist Rieekan|}} With enemy forces in the region cleared, an Alliance [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]], using Imperial identification so as not to attract suspicion, landed on the planet and effected the cargo transfer with the convoy from the Barkhesh Resistance. The cargo provided by the Barkhesh rebels would assist the Alliance in replenishing the supplies lost during the evacuation of Yavin Base. ==Behind the scenes== The Rendezvous on Barkhesh was featured in the second level—also entitled ''Rendezvous on Barkhesh''—of the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']], which was released in [[1998]]. The player takes on the role of Luke Skywalker during the mission. To get a gold medal on the level—the highest ranking a player can achieve in a mission—one must ensure that all friendly units are kept safe, and that at least thirty enemies are destroyed. To achieve this, the player must destroy the Imperial units located at the small base away from the battle zone. The mission can be completed without destroying all Imperial forces, and with friendly casualties, although the mission score will suffer as a result. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of the Rendezvous on Barkhesh}} {{Reflist}} {{GCW_0_ABY}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Barkhesh }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Barkhesh, Rendezvous on}} [[Category:Battles of Barkhesh]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]]
